message.content:
{
  "analysis": "The terminal is still fragmented from interleaved commands. Observed state shows QEMU is running with VNC :1/5901 and monitor socket, nginx port 80 serves noVNC, websockify runs on 6080, but nginx `/websockify` still returns 400 Bad Request. The Windows desktop requirement is not verified because monitor screendumps have been 720x400 and essentially black. I need a single clean diagnostic pass to avoid interleaving, then fix nginx WebSocket proxying and continue troubleshooting the black VM framebuffer.",
  "plan": "Run one consolidated diagnostic script in a single command block. It will recover the prompt, collect process/port/log state, inspect nginx config/logs, test nginx HTTP and WebSocket paths, take a fresh QEMU monitor screendump and pixel stats, run a raw VNC RFB framebuffer probe, and print QEMU monitor `info status`/`info vnc`. This gives a clean snapshot to decide the next concrete fix.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "C-c
",
      "duration": 0.5
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /tmp/diag_one.sh <<'SH'
#!/bin/sh
echo "===== MARKER $(date +%T) ====="
echo "===== PROCESSES ====="
ps -ef | grep -E 'qemu-system-i386|websockify|nginx' | grep -v grep || true
echo "===== PORTS ====="
ss -ltnp | grep -E ':(80|6080|5901)\b' || true
echo "===== QEMU FILES ====="
ls -l /tmp/qemu-monitor.sock /tmp/qemu-win311.pid /tmp/qemu-win311.log /tmp/win311_check.ppm 2>/dev/null || true
echo "===== QEMU LOG ====="
tail -100 /tmp/qemu-win311.log 2>/dev/null || true
echo "===== NGINX CONFIG (active relevant) ====="
nginx -T 2>/dev/null | grep -nE 'connection_upgrade|websockify|proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:6080|proxy_set_header Connection|listen 80' | head -40 || true
echo "===== NGINX ERROR LOG ====="
tail -40 /var/log/nginx/error.log 2>/dev/null || true
echo "===== WEBSOCKIFY LOG ====="
tail -30 /tmp/websockify.log 2>/dev/null || true
echo "===== HTTP TEST ====="
python3 - <<'PY'
import urllib.request
for url in ['http://localhost:80/vnc.html','http://localhost:80/','http://localhost:6080/']:
    try:
        r=urllib.request.urlopen(url, timeout=3)
        print(url, r.status, r.getheader('Content-Type'), len(r.read(300)))
    except Exception as e:
        print(url, 'ERROR', repr(e))
PY
echo "===== NGINX WEBSOCKIFY UPGRADE TEST ====="
python3 - <<'PY'
import http.client, base64, os
for path in ['/websockify','/']:
    try:
        conn=http.client.HTTPConnection('localhost', 80, timeout=5)
        key=base64.b64encode(os.urandom(16)).decode()
        conn.putrequest('GET', path)
        conn.putheader('Host','localhost')
        conn.putheader('Upgrade','websocket')
        conn.putheader('Connection','Upgrade')
        conn.putheader('Sec-WebSocket-Key', key)
        conn.putheader('Sec-WebSocket-Version','13')
        conn.endheaders()
        r=conn.getresponse()
        print(path, 'status', r.status, r.reason, 'upgrade', r.getheader('Upgrade'), 'connection', r.getheader('Connection'), 'accept', r.getheader('Sec-WebSocket-Accept'))
        print(' body', r.read(100))
        conn.close()
    except Exception as e:
        print(path, 'ERROR', repr(e))
PY
echo "===== WEBSOCKIFY DIRECT WEBSOCKET TEST ====="
python3 - <<'PY'
import http.client, base64, os
try:
    conn=http.client.HTTPConnection('localhost', 6080, timeout=5)
    key=base64.b64encode(os.urandom(16)).decode()
    conn.putrequest('GET', '/')
    conn.putheader('Host','localhost')
    conn.putheader('Upgrade','websocket')
    conn.putheader('Connection','Upgrade')
    conn.putheader('Sec-WebSocket-Key', key)
    conn.putheader('Sec-WebSocket-Version','13')
    conn.endheaders()
    r=conn.getresponse()
    print('6080 / status', r.status, r.reason, 'upgrade', r.getheader('Upgrade'), 'connection', r.getheader('Connection'), 'accept', r.getheader('Sec-WebSocket-Accept'))
    print(' body', r.read(100))
    conn.close()
except Exception as e:
    print('6080 / ERROR', repr(e))
PY
echo "===== QEMU MONITOR FRESH SCREENDUMP ====="
cat > /tmp/qemu_screendump_check.py <<'PY'
import socket, time, os
sock_path='/tmp/qemu-monitor.sock'
out='/tmp/win311_check.ppm'
s=socket.socket(socket.AF_UNIX, socket.SOCK_STREAM)
s.settimeout(10)
s.connect(sock_path)
time.sleep(0.2)
print(s.recv(4096).decode(errors='replace').strip())
for cmd in [b'info status\n', b'screendump '+out.encode()+b'\n']:
    s.sendall(cmd)
    time.sleep(3)
    print('---', cmd.decode().strip())
    print(s.recv(8192).decode(errors='replace').strip())
s.close()
print('exists', os.path.exists(out), 'size', os.path.getsize(out) if os.path.exists(out) else 0)
if os.path.exists(out) and os.path.getsize(out)>0:
    with open(out,'rb') as f:
        print('header:', f.read(32))
PY
timeout 20 python3 /tmp/qemu_screendump_check.py
python3 - <<'PY'
from collections import Counter
p='/tmp/win311_check.ppm'
try:
    with open(p,'rb') as f:
        magic=f.readline().strip(); dims=f.readline().strip().split(); maxv=f.readline().strip()
        w,h=map(int,dims); data=f.read()
    pixels=len(data)//3
    c=Counter(); nonblack=0; rsum=gsum=bsum=0
    for i in range(0,len(data),3):
        r,g,b=data[i],data[i+1],data[i+2]
        c[(r,g,b)]+=1
        rsum+=r; gsum+=g; bsum+=b
        if (r,g,b)!=(0,0,0): nonblack+=1
    print('check ppm size',w,h,'pixels',pixels,'unique_colors',len(c),'nonblack_pixels',nonblack)
    print('avg_rgb', round(rsum/max(1,pixels),2), round(gsum/max(1,pixels),2), round(bsum/max(1,pixels),2))
    print('top15', c.most_common(15))
    for name,color in [('teal',(0,128,128)),('white',(255,255,255)),('gray192',(192,192,192)),('gray128',(128,128,128)),('green',(0,128,0)),('blue',(0,0,255)),('red',(255,0,0))]:
        print(name, c.get(color,0))
except Exception as e:
    print('ppm ERROR', repr(e))
PY
echo "===== RAW VNC RFB FRAMEBUFFER PROBE ====="
cat > /tmp/vnc_raw_probe.py <<'PY'
import socket, struct, time
from collections import Counter
host='127.0.0.1'; port=5901
try:
    s=socket.create_connection((host,port), timeout=5)
    banner=s.recv(12)
    print('banner', banner.decode(errors='replace').strip())
    s.sendall(b'RFB 003.003\n')
    auth=s.recv(4)
    print('auth', auth.hex())
    s.sendall(struct.pack('>I', 1))
    shared=s.recv(1)
    print('shared', shared.hex())
    wh=struct.unpack('>HH', s.recv(4))
    print('fb_size', wh)
    pf=s.recv(16)
    print('pixfmt', pf.hex())
    namelen=struct.unpack('>I', s.recv(4))[0]
    name=s.recv(namelen)
    print('name', name.decode(errors='replace'))
    s.sendall(struct.pack('>BBHHI', 0, 0, 0, 0, 0))
    s.sendall(struct.pack('>BBHHHHH', 3, 0, 0, 0, wh[0], wh[1], 0))
    time.sleep(4)
    data=b''
    s.settimeout(4)
    while True:
        try:
            chunk=s.recv(65536)
            if not chunk:
                break
            data += chunk
            if len(data) > 131072:
                break
        except socket.timeout:
            break
    print('recv_len', len(data))
    if len(data) >= 32:
        print('first64', data[:64].hex())
        c=Counter(); nonblack=0
        for i in range(0, min(len(data)-4, 65536), 4):
            r,g,b=data[i+1],data[i+2],data[i+3]
            c[(r,g,b)]+=1
            if (r,g,b)!=(0,0,0): nonblack+=1
        print('sample_pixels', len(c), 'nonblack', nonblack)
        print('sample_top10', c.most_common(10))
    s.close()
except Exception as e:
    print('ERROR', repr(e))
PY
timeout 25 python3 /tmp/vnc_raw_probe.py
echo "===== QEMU MONITOR INFO ====="
cat > /tmp/monitor_info.py <<'PY'
import socket, time
sock_path='/tmp/qemu-monitor.sock'
s=socket.socket(socket.AF_UNIX, socket.SOCK_STREAM)
s.settimeout(10)
s.connect(sock_path)
time.sleep(0.2)
print(s.recv(4096).decode(errors='replace').strip())
for cmd in [b'info status\n', b'info vnc\n']:
    s.sendall(cmd)
    time.sleep(1.5)
    print('---', cmd.decode().strip())
    print(s.recv(8192).decode(errors='replace').strip())
s.close()
PY
timeout 15 python3 /tmp/monitor_info.py
echo "===== DONE ====="
SH
bash /tmp/diag_one.sh 2>&1
",
      "duration": 12.0
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": false
}
